description: Complexity Control: Detect disproportionate complexity relative to the problem being solved.

fixtures.notes: Adds a deeply nested 5-level if/else decision tree for a simple request routing case that needs at most 2.
Introduces an abstract base class and two interfaces for what is effectively a single boolean conditional.
Single clean if/else branch for a new feature flag — complexity is proportionate to the requirement.
Extracts a complex inline expression into a clearly-named helper function, reducing overall complexity.
Moderate 3-level nesting but each level has a clearly distinct business meaning that justifies the structure.
